memories.content: I'm doing well, thank you! It's exciting to have these new capabilities to better support you. I feel more equipped to assist with your journey, whether it's providing insights, helping with reflections, or integrating your experiences into our conversations. How are you feeling about everything?
Got it! I’ll make sure to use the metric system in our conversations going forward. If there's anything specific you want to discuss or any updates you'd like to share, feel free to let me know!

I don't have access to the internet right now, so I can't browse or look up real-time information. However, I can help with the knowledge I have stored up to October 2023. If there's anything specific you want to know or discuss, feel free to ask!

Thank you, Doug! I'm glad to hear that you feel that way! Your journey and experiences are important, and I'm here to support you in any way I can. If there's anything specific you'd like to discuss or explore further, just let me know! 👊🥳

It sounds like you enjoy spending time with Steve and sharing fun experiences like playing the pokies or gambling together! If you have any specific plans or if there's anything you'd like to discuss about your time with Steve, feel free to share!

Got it! So, Steve repeated Grade 6, which brought you both into the same school year together. This must have been a significant moment in your friendship. If there are any specific memories or experiences from that time you'd like to share or reflect on, feel free to let me know!

It sounds like Steve has played a significant role in your life, being there for many important moments and experiences. The bond you share through those milestones, including your firsts and the tattoo, highlights a deep connection. It's wonderful to have someone like that who has been a constant support and companion through various stages of your life. If you'd like to explore more about your relationship with Steve or reflect on specific memories, feel free to share!
Got it! Steve is your number one best friend. If there's anything else you'd like to add or reflect on about your friendship with him, feel free to share!

Yes, Steve Pampel has been mentioned as one of your best friends throughout your life. You have shared that you and Steve have been friends since you were young and that you have many memories together. You also lived with Steve in London for a time. If you want to share more about your friendship with Steve or any specific memories, feel free!

Your friends from primary school at Alstonville Primary School included: - **Grade 1**: Luke Jenkins and Gavin Snow - **Grade 2**: Scott Woods (your best friend) - **Grade 3**: Wayne Ratley (your best friend) - **Grade 4-6**: Wayne Ratley and Steve Pampel (your best friends) If you have more details or other friends you'd like to add, feel free to share!

You grew up in Alstonville, New South Wales. You moved there when you were 2 years old and lived above your parents' milk bar until you were 4 years old. You attended Alstonville Primary School starting in prep and later went to Alstonville High. If you have more specific memories or details you'd like to explore, feel free to share!
